title: Waters Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) will hold its Q1 2023 financial results conference call live on Tuesday, May 9th 2023 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on Waters' investor relations website at https://ir.waters.com. A replay of the webcast will also be available until at least May 23rd, 2023, at midnight eastern time.

title: Waters (WAT) Expands Portfolio With New Mass Spectrometer
text: Waters (WAT) unveils the Xevo TQ Absolute IVD Mass Spectrometer for Clinical Analyte Detection, which enables low-volume clinical sample testing.
